partial_progress.details: Phase 6b blocked: Deep analysis reveals 13 sorries require well-founded iteration infrastructure. All sorries share pattern of witness being equivalent to endpoint. Documented key dichotomy: GContent(M') subset of GContent(M) requires iteration escape mechanism.

completion_data.completion_summary: Mathematical analysis of 13 sorries completed. All share pattern where constructed witness is equivalent to an endpoint (M or M'). Key insight: if GContent(M') is not subset of GContent(M), Case A formula exists for direct proof. Otherwise, iteration with termination via subformulaClosure cardinality is required.
completion_data.blocking_insight: The 'all Case B' scenario where GContent(M') ⊆ GContent(M) causes all forward witnesses from M to be absorbed by reflexive M' cluster. Escape requires seriality to find new target with smaller subformulaClosure measure.

review_reason: Phase 6b blocked: Implementing fuel_suffices requires complex well-founded recursion infrastructure with Nat.strongRecOn on subformulaClosure cardinality. Two approaches: (1) implement full iteration machinery, (2) axiomatize strict density and defer proof.
